name: North Shore Surf Girls
tagline: All-female instructors, welcoming vibes, and North Shore waves — the best surf school for women and anyone who wants a supportive, ego-free learning environment.
price: $$ — Group lesson ~$99, private ~$189 (2 hrs, all equipment included)
parking: Meet at Haleiwa Beach Park; free lot with ample parking
hours: Daily 9 AM–3 PM; book online in advance
bestTime: Summer for gentlest waves; morning sessions for best conditions
talkStory: Founded by Carol Philips — the first woman to compete against men at Banzai Pipeline — North Shore Surf Girls started as a passion project to get more women in the water and grew into one of Oahu's most respected surf schools. All instructors are experienced female surfers who create a relaxed, encouraging atmosphere — no machismo, no yelling, just patient coaching. They teach at beginner-friendly spots around Haleiwa and adjust the location based on daily conditions, which shows real local knowledge. The school also runs multi-day surf camps and SUP lessons. Popular with solo female travelers, mother-daughter trips, and bachelorette groups, but they welcome everyone regardless of gender. Small group sizes (max 4 per instructor) mean real personalized attention.
